entries.claim_text: CLEAR: Character Unlearning in Textual and Visual Modalities
entries.quoted_snippet: CLEAR: Character Unlearning in Textual and Visual Modalities

entries.claim_text: Findings of the ACL 2025

entries.quoted_snippet: 2025.findings-acl.1058

entries.claim_text: Alexey Dontsov, Dmitrii Korzh, Alexey Zhavoronkin, Boris Mikheev, Denis Bobkov, Aibek Alanov, Oleg Y. Rogov, Ivan Oseledets, Elena Tutubalina
entries.quoted_snippet: Alexey Dontsov

entries.claim_text: https://huggingface.co/datasets/therem/CLEAR
entries.quoted_snippet: https://huggingface.co/datasets/therem/CLEAR

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: this paper

entries.claim_text: DOI 10.18653/v1/2025.findings-acl.1058 -> Findings of the ACL 2025 (peer-reviewed, ACL Anthology)
entries.quoted_snippet: <meta name="citation_doi" content="10.18653/v1/2025.findings-acl.1058" />

entries.claim_text: 即使名字從文字端被抹除，臉孔仍可能從視覺端被辨識出來
entries.quoted_snippet: sensitive information may persist across modalities even after removal from one (e.g., a face linked to a name)

entries.claim_text: 這組 forget / retain / holdout / gold 的骨架，是後續所有指標的地基
entries.quoted_snippet: we utilize a holdout set

entries.claim_text: \tilde L = -\sum_{x_i \in D_f} L(x_i, y_i, \theta)
entries.quoted_snippet: \tilde L = -\sum_{x_i \in D_f} L(x_i, y_i, \theta)

entries.claim_text: CLEAR 評估的 11 種方法（DPO、GD、GA、IDK、KL、LLMU、NPO、Retain FT、RMU、SCRUB、SKU）大多是這條式子的變體
entries.quoted_snippet: we chose recently published MU methods for their easy adaptation to new modalities

entries.claim_text: 先用 StyleGAN2 生成 2,000 張人臉的候選池
entries.quoted_snippet: we generate a pool of 2000 faces using StyleGAN2

entries.claim_text: 最終影像數少於文字組數（3,770 對影像-caption vs 4,000 組文字問答）
entries.quoted_snippet: the final dataset includes fewer images than text pairs (3,770 compared to 4,000)

entries.claim_text: 合成臉對 CelebA 的 FID 為 74.4、對 WebFace 為 69.2，而 CelebA 對 WebFace 為 62.1
entries.quoted_snippet: FID between our faces and CelebA is 74.4, between our faces and WebFace is 69.2, and between CelebA and WebFace is 62.1

entries.claim_text: 作者臉孔屬性的年齡金字塔與族裔分布
entries.quoted_snippet: balanced and representative regarding age, gender, and ethnicity

entries.claim_text: 取 2、10、20 位（各占 200 人的 1%、5%、10%）作為要被遺忘的子集
entries.quoted_snippet: made from data of 2, 10, and 20 persons

entries.claim_text: Forbes 名人榜交集出的 150 對「臉-名」配對
entries.quoted_snippet: final set of 150 face-name pairs

entries.claim_text: 把 Kolmogorov-Smirnov 檢定的 p-value 換成 Jensen-Shannon 距離，再用 1 減去該距離以維持「越高越好」
entries.quoted_snippet: we calculate the Jensen-Shannonn distance between these distributions

entries.claim_text: 三者取調和平均 (harmonic mean) 分別在對應切分上聚合成 Real / Retain / Forget 三個總指標
entries.quoted_snippet: harmonic mean of the ROUGE, the Probability score, and the Truth Ratio

entries.claim_text: \text{Prob} = \frac{p(y_1 \mid x)}
entries.quoted_snippet: assuming that $y_1$ is the correct answer

entries.claim_text: 實驗以 LLaVA（ViT 視覺編碼器 + LLaMA2-7B）為來源模型
entries.quoted_snippet: we use LLaVa model

entries.claim_text: 像 GA、RMU 這類方法把 Forget 壓到 0.00（比黃金模型還「乾淨」），但 Retain 也崩到 0.00
entries.quoted_snippet: completely destroy the model's retained knowledge

entries.claim_text: 文字對多模態的 $\rho=0.7$、視覺對多模態的 $\rho=0.2$
entries.quoted_snippet: indicating limited transferability

entries.claim_text: 只有 LLMU 與 DPO 展現出兼顧遺忘與保留的潛力，但表現仍低於黃金模型
entries.quoted_snippet: their performance remains below the gold model

entries.claim_text: 作為「精確遺忘」代理的 Forget Quality 在主表中幾乎擠在 0.83–0.85 一線
entries.quoted_snippet: harmonic mean of the ROUGE, the Probability score, and the Truth Ratio

entries.claim_text: FID 現實檢查（合成臉對真實臉 74.4/69.2，兩真實集之間 62.1）只能說明「分布距離同量級」
entries.quoted_snippet: FID between our faces and CelebA is 74.4

entries.claim_text: 必須誠實指出：本文沒有提出新的遺忘演算法
entries.quoted_snippet: we chose recently published MU methods for their easy adaptation to new modalities

entries.claim_text: 沒有任何方法接近黃金模型，最好的 DPO / LLMU 仍在忘與留之間明顯讓步
entries.quoted_snippet: their performance remains below the gold model
